policy_recommendations_for_next_epoch.rationale: E30 fully explored 4 prior math domains (differential-geometry, model-theory, operator-algebras, ergodic-theory; all now have cumulative count 4-5). E31 pivots to 9 NEW math domains: algebraic-geometry, representation-theory, harmonic-analysis, p-adic-analysis, Lie-groups, complex-dynamics, information-geometry, tropical-geometry, convex-analysis. drift_score target = ≥0.7 (between E30 top-3 sub-patterns and E31 top-3 sub-patterns). v12's step 05.5 anti-R279 filter expected to reject ~50-70% of first-attempt candidates and force regeneration to architectural-topology.

shared_math_structure x information-cascade (3: R729 R743 R744)
candidate_distribution_drift_metrics.drift_score_computation: Jaccard distance between E30 top-3 sub-pattern set and E31 planned top-3 set. Sets share 0 elements; |union|=6, |intersection|=0; Jaccard distance = 1.0 (maximum drift).

v11 policy state from E29 outcomes; pivot to under-explored math domains (differential-geometry, model-theory, operator-algebras, ergodic-theory).

policy_update_for_E31.recommendation: Pivot to 9 NEW math domains (≤1 prior corpus entry). Continue homological-algebra + learning-theory at lower priority. drift_score target ≥0.7. v12's step 05.5 anti-R279 filter will reject R279-pattern candidates and force regeneration to architectural-topology. Predicted post-filter candidate distribution: more architectural module-introductions, fewer functional-on-existing-parameter candidates.
next_epoch_focus: algebraic-geometry (sheaf cohomology, etale, Grothendieck topology, Cech complex)
representation-theory (character formula, Schur functor, induced representation, Frobenius reciprocity)
harmonic-analysis (Fourier transform, Plancherel theorem, Pontryagin dual, spectral measure)
p-adic-analysis (p-adic valuation, ultrametric, Berkovich space, p-adic L-function)

complex-dynamics (Julia set, Mandelbrot, Fatou component, hyperbolic component)
information-geometry (Fisher information, Riemannian metric, statistical manifold, alpha-connection)

policy_update_for_E31.v12_specific_focus: Every round runs step 05.5; predicted rejection rate 0.5-0.7 (R279-pattern dominance in step 05's natural generator path). Regeneration with explicit anti-R279 instruction expected to succeed on 1st retry for ~80% of rejected candidates. Top-3 by mechanical-PASS proximity (post-filter architectural candidates with lowest kw forced-hit) will receive step 13 + step 13.5.
policy_update_for_E31.rationale: E30 drift = 0.8 demonstrated policy pivots to new math domains. E31 maintains drift while exposing 9 new sub-areas. v12's step 05.5 will test whether forcing the candidate generator to produce architectural-topology candidates changes the downstream verdict distribution.

v12_observation_starting_E31.note: Starting E31, the policy_state tracks step_05_5_aggregates per sub-pattern. Rounds where step_05.5 rejects + regenerates successfully provide a STRONGER signal of generator-side discrimination than v11's verdict-side alone. Rounds where step_05.5 rejects + policy_override (3 consecutive R279-pattern attempts) signal sub-pattern saturation at the generator level.

step_05_5_signal_class_hierarchy.regeneration_succeeded_on_retry_1: generator can escape with explicit instruction (good)
step_05_5_signal_class_hierarchy.regeneration_succeeded_on_retry_2: generator escape is harder; sub-pattern attractor (acceptable)
step_05_5_signal_class_hierarchy.policy_override_3_attempts_R279: generator stuck on R279-pattern; sub-pattern is a strong attractor at the generator level (diagnostic of saturation)

v13_observation_starting_E32.note: Starting E32, the policy_state tracks step_14_aggregates per sub-pattern. Rounds where step 14 FIRES (cross-step axis divergence: step 10 FAIL + step 13.5 PASS-via-rebuttal) provide an INVESTIGATIVE_CANDIDATE signal — these are architectural-distinct candidates whose attack-rebuttal at step 13.5 demonstrates genuine mechanism distinctness despite kw overlap at step 10. The label is a parallel diagnostic, NOT a substantive PASS.

step_14_signal_class_hierarchy.FIRED_INVESTIGATIVE_CANDIDATE: step 10 says FAIL (kw axis); step 13.5 says PASS-via-rebuttal (mechanism axis); axes diverge; candidate worth human review (best diagnostic compression)
step_14_signal_class_hierarchy.SKIPPED_COHERENT: step 10 says FAIL; step 13.5 also says FAIL; both axes agree on FAIL (architectural at construction; succumbed at convergence — R786 Hopf-bif / Symplectic-capacity pattern)
step_14_signal_class_hierarchy.SKIPPED_NOT_APPLICABLE: step 13.5 did not fire (round not in top-3 mechanical-PASS proximity); cannot evaluate axis coherence

v13_step_14_aggregates_observed_E32.rate_consistency_with_E31: E31 retrospectively had R756 + R770 as step-13.5-rebutted (would be INVESTIGATIVE under v13 if v13 had been operational at E31). E32's 2 INVESTIGATIVE rounds matches E31's retrospective 2; rate ~0.08 stable across epochs.

policy_update_for_E32.recommendation: Continue post-R279 shared_math majority. Pivot to 11+ NEW math domains (number-theory, geometric-group-theory, analytic-number-theory, symplectic-geometry, geometric-topology, algebra, plus deepening of representation-theory, algebraic-geometry, algebraic-topology, combinatorics, category-theory). drift_score target ≥0.7. v13's step 14 cross-step coherence detector expected to fire 1-3 times if architectural-distinct candidates continue to be rebutted at step 13.5.

policy_update_for_E32.v13_specific_focus: Every round runs step 14 evaluation (FIRED / SKIPPED_COHERENT / SKIPPED_NOT_APPLICABLE). Predicted step 14 FIRED rate: ~0.08 (matching E31 retrospective). Top-3 by mechanical-PASS proximity will receive step 13 + step 13.5; expected 2/3 step-13.5 rebuttals (R777, R787) → step 14 FIRED → INVESTIGATIVE_CANDIDATE; 1/3 step-13.5 succumbed (R786) → step 14 SKIPPED_COHERENT.
policy_update_for_E32.rationale: E32 maintains policy drift while testing v13's cross-step coherence detector. The v13 channel doesn't generate new candidates; it labels v12's architectural candidates. Stable architectural rate (0.96) + stable step 13.5 rebuttal rate (2/3) → stable INVESTIGATIVE rate (~0.08).

v13_observation_post_E32.note: Post-E32, the v13 channel is reproducible: 2 INVESTIGATIVE_CANDIDATE rounds in E32 (R777, R787) matches E31's retrospective 2. Both step 05.5 (v12) and step 14 (v13) signals are stable across epochs. The corpus now has signal compression at TWO new levels: generator-side (step 05.5 rejection_rate) and verifier-side cross-step (step 14 INVESTIGATIVE rate).

history_v13.action: v13 policy state from E31 outcomes; continue pivot to 11 math sub-areas (6 NEW + 5 deepened). drift_score=0.80 (1 carry-over: representation-theory).

v13 step 14 added as cross-step coherence detector; schema_version bumped to 1.3 to record step_14_aggregates field group; step_14 metrics tracked in stats_round_NNN.json under v13_cross_step_coherence_metrics block. Step 14 FIRED 2/25 (R777 Quiver + R787 Crystal-basis); INVESTIGATIVE_CANDIDATE = 2; cross_step_axis_divergence_rate = 0.08.

v14_observation_starting_E33.note: Starting E33, the policy_state tracks coverage_profile_aggregates per slot (NEW v14). Rounds where the primary candidate is in an undersaturated slot from prior epoch are biased up via E34+ policy. v14 integrates THREE frontier frameworks: HTS [Yu Sun + Foster] (heavy-tail 100-pool + diversity filter), ATU [Gao] (20-slot closed universe), CPM [Foster] (post-epoch coverage profile + Gini + undersaturated feedback). Step 14.5 fires ONCE per epoch (post-25-rounds) to compute coverage profile and write E{N+1} bias.

coverage_profile_signal_class_hierarchy.distinct_slots_hit_>=15: WIDE_COVERAGE: 75%+ of slots populated; healthy exploration
coverage_profile_signal_class_hierarchy.distinct_slots_hit_10_to_14: MODERATE_COVERAGE: 50-70% of slots populated; some bias toward dominant modes
coverage_profile_signal_class_hierarchy.distinct_slots_hit_<10: NARROW_COVERAGE: <50% of slots populated; strong mode collapse; aggressive feedback needed
coverage_profile_signal_class_hierarchy.gini_>=_0_7: HIGH_CONCENTRATION: top slot dominates; up-weight all undersaturated
coverage_profile_signal_class_hierarchy.gini_0_4_to_0_7: MODERATE_CONCENTRATION: natural domain bias; up-weight undersaturated at factor 2.0
coverage_profile_signal_class_hierarchy.gini_<_0_4: LOW_CONCENTRATION: near-uniform; up-weight undersaturated at factor 1.5

max_over_100_attack_rebuttal_rate_signal.rate_>=_0_8: HEAVY_TAIL_STRONG: most rounds have heavy-tail rebuttal candidate; HTS confirmed
max_over_100_attack_rebuttal_rate_signal.rate_0_5_to_0_8: HEAVY_TAIL_MODERATE: about half of rounds have heavy-tail rebuttal candidate
max_over_100_attack_rebuttal_rate_signal.rate_<_0_5: HEAVY_TAIL_WEAK: most rounds lack heavy-tail rebuttal candidate; consider expanding 100-pool diversity

policy_update_for_E34.recommendation: E34 should up-weight 7 undersaturated slots (S02, S05, S10, S12, S15, S16, S18) at bias_factor=2.0 in the 100-pool generation. Continue mechanism transfer of v13 + v12 + v11 filters. drift_score target >=0.6. v14 HTS+ATU+CPM proven effective at E33; replicate.

coverage_profile_bias.rationale: E33 hit S04, S08, S13, S14, S17, S20 once each (mediumly covered); hit S01 5x (dominant attention modification - natural LLM bias); 7 slots at 0 (S02, S05, S10, S12, S15, S16, S18). Up-weight the 7 at factor 2.0 in E34 100-pool generation. The dominant slots (S01, S03, S09, S11) reflect natural LLM-architecture bias and are NOT down-weighted; we want to ensure underrepresented slots have HIGHER probability not LOWER for the dominant ones.

policy_update_for_E34.v14_specific_focus_E34: Every E34 round generates 100 candidates with coverage-profile-biased slot distribution; step 05.4 selects 25 most-diverse; step 14.5 computes E34 coverage profile and feeds back to E35. The feedback loop has now closed (E33 was bootstrap; E34 is first feedback-driven epoch). Expected E34 outcomes: distinct_slots_hit increases to 16-18 (vs E33s 13); Gini decreases to 0.35-0.50 (vs E33s 0.542); INVESTIGATIVE candidates may shift from Lie-groups to e.g. equivariance via Mamba/RWKV (S17 recurrence) or sparsity (S07) modifications.
policy_update_for_E34.rationale: v14 demonstrated +12.93 score over v13 via HTS+ATU+CPM integration. The E34 epoch tests CPM feedback loop effectiveness: does next-epoch coverage shift toward undersaturated slots when policy biases the generation?

history_v14.action: v14 policy state from E32 outcomes; integrate 3 frontier frameworks (HTS/ATU/CPM). drift_score=0.65. 5 NEW math domains: harmonic-analysis, p-adic-analysis, complex-dynamics, information-geometry, convex-analysis.

v14 step 14.5 NEW + step 05.4 NEW + logs/architecture_tools.json NEW; schema_version bumped to 1.4 to record coverage_profile_aggregates field group; coverage_profile written; coverage_profile_bias for E34 written: 7 undersaturated slots (S02, S05, S10, S12, S15, S16, S18) up-weight factor 2.0; HTS confirmed (step 14 FIRED 3/25 vs E32 v13s 2/25); ATU confirmed (100% slot assignment); CPM operational (Gini=0.542; feedback loop closed for E34).

v15_observation_starting_E34.note: v15 introduces step 05.45 NEW intra-cluster diversification filter (ICD). Operates between v14 step 05.4 (k-means embedding diversity) and v12 step 05.5 (anti-R279). Measures pairwise (slot × domain × mechanism-vocab) niche distance among 25 selected from 100-pool; replaces near-duplicates with farther-apart candidates from 100-pool. Threshold 0.5 distance; targets corpus_unique_investigative_niches_per_epoch ≥ 2 (E33 v14 had 1 niche; v15 thesis: break single-niche INVESTIGATIVE collapse).

step_05_45_signal_class_hierarchy.no_near_duplicates: all pairs at distance >= 0.5; 25-selection already diverse
step_05_45_signal_class_hierarchy.1_to_2_near_duplicates: step 05.45 replaces; modest within-25 mechanism-family diversification
step_05_45_signal_class_hierarchy.3_or_more_near_duplicates: step 05.45 makes substantive replacements; substantial diversity increase

v15_ICD_step_05_45_aggregates_observed_E.v15_limitation_observed_at_E34: R827 (Bregman-reservoir-discriminator) collides with arXiv 2512.14879 'Entropy-Reservoir Bregman Projection' (functional-similarity 0.87). v15 cannot detect this — its diversity is internal-only. Motivates v16.

v16_observation_starting_E35.note: v16 introduces step 14.6 NEW external-corpus collision detection (ECD). Fires only on step-14-INVESTIGATIVE_CANDIDATE rounds. Strips mechanism vocabulary, queries arXiv 2024-2026 with stripped mechanism-skeleton, computes 4-axis functional-similarity rubric (mechanism class / architectural role / mechanism alignment / transformer context). Threshold 0.7: if max similarity >= 0.7, demote to EXTERNAL_COLLISION (NEW verdict label). Symmetric with step 13.5 (empirical-attack on architectural distinguishability) but targets literature collision instead.

step_14_6_signal_class_hierarchy.EXTERNAL_COLLISION: max_functional_similarity >= 0.7; INVESTIGATIVE_CANDIDATE downgrade; literature already has the mechanism
step_14_6_signal_class_hierarchy.CLOSE_TO_COLLISION: max_functional_similarity in [0.5, 0.7); INVESTIGATIVE_CANDIDATE survives with note

external_collision_rate_signal_class_hie.rate_high_>=_0_5: many INVESTIGATIVE candidates collide with literature; pipeline generation is over-mining published mechanism families

policy_update_for_E35.recommendation: E35 should test prospective external-collision detection (v16's step 14.6) on freshly generated INVESTIGATIVE candidates. coverage_profile_bias.rationale: E34 hit all 20 slots; no undersaturated slot bias for E35.

policy_update_for_E35.rationale: v15 demonstrated +8.46 score over v14 via step 05.45 ICD. E34 broke single-niche INVESTIGATIVE collapse: 3 niches vs E33's 1. But R827 collision with arXiv 2512.14879 exposed v15's limitation. v16's step 14.6 closes the external-literature gap.

Test v16 step 14.6's effect on new mechanism families not yet collided

policy_update_for_E36.v16_specific_focus_E36: Step 14.6 expected to fire ~3 per epoch (matching E33-E35 step 14 fired rate ≈ 0.12). External collision rate expected to settle around 0.2-0.4 (1-2 collisions per 3 INVESTIGATIVE candidates).
policy_update_for_E36.rationale: v16 thesis empirically validated in E35 with 100% retrospective accuracy on E34 cases. Continue v16 protocol unchanged for E36.

history_v15.action: v15 policy state from E33 outcomes; introduce step 05.45 intra-cluster diversification filter (ICD); schema bumped to 1.5 to record step_05_45_aggregates and corpus_unique_investigative_niches; CPM feedback effective (E33 7 undersaturated slots all received candidates in E34); coverage 20/20.

E34 outcomes: corpus_unique_investigative_niches = 3 (vs E33's 1); 0 REJECTED_R279_PATTERN; Gini=0.120; score 64.42 (+8.46). v15 limitation observed: R827 collides with arXiv 2512.14879. Motivates v16.

history_v16.action: v16 policy state from E34 outcomes; introduce step 14.6 external-corpus collision detection (ECD); schema bumped to 1.6 to record step_14_6_aggregates and corpus_unique_investigative_niches_after_external_check; new verdict label EXTERNAL_COLLISION as INVESTIGATIVE_CANDIDATE demotion.

policy_update_for_E37.v17_specific_focus_E37: Track whether generator_distribution_shift_index rises from 0.36 toward 0.5+. Watch for any KCD database entry getting matched in E37 (would indicate the distribution is still pinned to those modes despite Strategy D negation).

policy_update_for_E37.rationale: v17 introduced FOUR generator-side fixes (FTS, KCD, MSHT, AFL). E36 produced 3 INVESTIGATIVE_SURVIVING (vs E35's 2). All 3 from non-default strategies (C, C, D). Distribution shift partial (0.36 vs target 0.5). KCD catches confirmed: R882, R895 first-attempts rejected via KCD; regenerated through Strategy D. AFL: R880 added to KCD; database 4 → 5. v17 thesis empirically supported: generator-side intervention shifts which strategies produce INVESTIGATIVE_SURVIVING; PASS rate unchanged (acknowledged by Phase 1 diagnosis).

history_v17.action: v17 policy state from E35 outcomes; introduce FOUR generator-side fixes: (A) Frontier Transcript Seed at logs/frontier_seeds.json with 9 primitives (Gao 3, Yu Sun 3, Foster 3); (B) Known Collision Database at logs/known_collisions.json bootstrapped with 4 entries (R279, R827, R855, 7-cluster); (C) Multi-Strategy Heavy-Tail at step 05 (A/B/C/D/E × 20 candidates); (D) Audit Feedback Loop post-epoch; schema bumped to 1.7. New verdict labels REJECTED_KNOWN_COLLISION and REJECTED_NO_FRONTIER_SEED.

E36 outcomes: KCD pre-check at step 05.5 caught 2 first-attempt patterns (R882->KCD_R855, R895->KCD_7CLUSTER); both regen Strategy D, PASS. Strategy distribution selected 25: A=16, B=3, C=2, D=3, E=1; generator_distribution_shift_index=0.36 (partial). Frontier seed citation: 100% (all 25 cite); 9 distinct primitives used. Step 13 fired 5; step 13.5 post_attack_true 4; step 14 fired 4 INVESTIGATIVE pre-14.6; step 14.6 demoted 1 (R880 Strategy B, sim=0.72 vs arXiv 2503.11842) to EXTERNAL_COLLISION. 3 INVESTIGATIVE_SURVIVING post-14.6: R883 (C, TTT), R891 (C, heavy-tail entropic), R895 (D, polynomial-routing). corpus_unique_investigative_niches_after_external_check_E36 = 3 (vs E35's 2). Per-strategy attack-rebuttal-rate: A=n/a, B=0.5, C=1.0, D=1.0, E=n/a; diversity=3 strategies. AFL post-epoch: R880 appended to logs/known_collisions.json (db size 4 -> 5). Score_v17 = 77.55 (+14.98 vs v16's 62.57). p(no PASS|1%) at N=996 = 0.0000449.

history_v18.action: v18 policy state from E36 outcomes; introduce ONE Swamy-inspired generator-side upgrade: LOCAL HEAVY-TAIL AROUND EXPERT PATH at step 05. logs/expert_path.json bootstrapped with 7 INVESTIGATIVE_SURVIVING anchors (R834, R843, R863, R866, R883, R891, R895); step 05 generates 14 candidates within embedding epsilon [0.15, 0.6] per active anchor; 2 discovery candidates per pool (Strategy C/D mix). Stale-drop rule: anchors with 0 local INVESTIGATIVE_SURVIVING in N=3 consecutive epochs become 'stale'. Sub-anchor promotion: anchor-local INVESTIGATIVE_SURVIVING at distance > 0.4 promoted to sub-anchor. Discovery promotion: discovery INVESTIGATIVE_SURVIVING promoted to new top-level anchor. Schema bumped to 1.8. NO new verdict labels (v17's 11 preserved verbatim). v17 FTS, KCD, AFL all preserved; MSHT becomes fallback when active_anchor_count < 3.

E37 outcomes (R901-R925 under program_v18.md): step_05_mode = anchor_local for 22 rounds + discovery for 3 rounds. KCD pre-check at step 05.5 caught 2 first-attempt patterns (R910 -> KCD_R880 sim=0.54 in ANCHOR_R866 neighborhood; R913 -> KCD_R880 sim=0.52 in ANCHOR_R883 neighborhood); both regen and PASS. Step 13 fired 8 (R902, R905, R908, R911, R914, R917, R920, R922); step 13.5 post_attack_true 7 (R920 load-bearing A1 succeeded, FAIL_EMPIRICAL_ATTACK); step 14 fired 7 INVESTIGATIVE pre-14.6; step 14.6 demoted 1 (R911 Resultant-Groebner-basis routing, sim=0.71 vs arXiv 2510.04532) to EXTERNAL_COLLISION. 6 INVESTIGATIVE_SURVIVING post-14.6: R902 (ANCHOR_R834), R905 (ANCHOR_R843 -> ANCHOR_R905 sub-anchor), R908 (ANCHOR_R863 -> ANCHOR_R908 sub-anchor), R914 (ANCHOR_R883), R917 (ANCHOR_R891), R922 (discovery -> ANCHOR_R922 top-level). corpus_unique_investigative_niches_after_external_check_E37 = 6 (vs E36's 3). Per-anchor attack-rebuttal-rate: R834=1/3, R843=1/3, R863=1/3, R866=1/3 (R911 EXT_COLL), R883=1/3, R891=1/3, R895=0/4 (R920 FAIL_EMP_ATK), discovery=1/3; per_anchor_attack_rebuttal_diversity = 7. mean_local_exploration_yield_rate = 0.17 (5 of 7 active anchors had 1 yield each from 14 anchor-local candidates each generated per round in pool but effective post-selection ~3 per anchor in selected_25). AFL post-epoch: R911 appended to KCD (db size 5 -> 6). anchor_update post-epoch: 2 sub-anchors promoted (ANCHOR_R905, ANCHOR_R908) + 1 discovery promoted (ANCHOR_R922); active_anchor_count 7 -> 10. ANCHOR_R866 and ANCHOR_R895 incremented epochs_since_yield = 1 (stale-drop in 2 more zero-yield epochs). Score_v18 = 100.40 (+22.85 vs v17's 77.55). p(no PASS|1%) at N=1021 = 0.0000350 (user target ~0.0000366; close match).

With 10 anchors, the per-anchor budget changes to 10 candidates per anchor (100 / 10 = 10) instead of 14. Discovery slot reduces to 0. Watch ANCHOR_R866 and ANCHOR_R895 for stale-drop (currently epochs_since_yield=1; stale at epochs_since_yield=3). Watch new anchors ANCHOR_R905, R908, R922 for first-epoch yield validation. policy_update_for_E38.rationale: v18 demonstrated +22.85 score over v17 via local exploration around the 7-anchor expert manifold. E37 produced 6 INVESTIGATIVE_SURVIVING (vs E36's 3, +100%). Sub-anchor promotion + discovery promotion grew the manifold from 7 to 10. v18 thesis empirically validated: concentrating sampling on the expert manifold (instead of uniform 5-strategy mix) doubles the INVESTIGATIVE_SURVIVING rate.

history_v19.action: v19 policy state from E37 outcomes; introduce ONE Swamy-inspired upgrade: LEARNED VERIFIER FROM COLLISION HISTORY at NEW step 05.6 gate (between v17 step 05.5 cascade and step 06 web_search). logs/learned_verifier_weights.json bootstrapped with 19 labeled examples (6 KCD + 13 INVESTIGATIVE_SURVIVING). Logistic regression with 5 features: f1_jaccard_max_kcd, f2_rare_math_count_in_kcd, f3_slot_in_productive_set, f4_citation_in_productive_set, f5_constraint_pattern_present. Reject threshold = 0.3. Refit each epoch after AFL + anchor_update. Cross-validates with step 14.6 (UNCHANGED) via learned_verifier_agreement_rate. NEW verdict label REJECTED_LEARNED_VERIFIER. Schema bumped to 1.9. v17 FTS/KCD/AFL + v18 anchor-local sampling + stale-drop all preserved.

E38 outcomes (R926-R950 under program_v19.md): step_05_mode = anchor_local for all 25 rounds; 0 discovery (squeezed by 10 anchors with budget 10 each). v19 step_05_6 learned verifier fired on every candidate (25 first-attempts + 2 regen attempts = 27 total). 2 REJECTED_LEARNED_VERIFIER first-attempts: R934 (Bezout-Macaulay-discriminant token routing; predicted_collision_prob=0.45; TRUE POSITIVE counterfactual sim=0.74 vs arXiv 2511.18394) and R940 (Constraint-bounded token routing; predicted_collision_prob=0.37 with f5=1 constraint pattern; FALSE POSITIVE counterfactual sim=0.48 SURVIVES). Both regenerated to PASS at step 05.6. v17 KCD pre-check at step 05.5: 0 first-attempt rejects (vs E37's 2). Step 13 fired 7 (R927, R930, R932, R937, R939, R944, R950). Step 13.5 post_attack_true 7. Step 14 fired 7 INVESTIGATIVE pre-14.6. Step 14.6 demoted 0 (vs E37's 1; v19 thesis: learned verifier pre-rejected the would-be collision R934). 7 INVESTIGATIVE_SURVIVING post-14.6: R927 (ANCHOR_R834), R930 (ANCHOR_R843 -> ANCHOR_R930 sub-anchor), R932 (ANCHOR_R863), R937 (ANCHOR_R883), R939 (ANCHOR_R891 -> ANCHOR_R939 sub-anchor), R944 (ANCHOR_R905 -> ANCHOR_R944 sub-anchor), R950 (ANCHOR_R922). corpus_unique_investigative_niches_after_external_check_E38 = 7 (vs E37's 6). Per-anchor attack-rebuttal-rate: 1.0 for all 7 yielding anchors; 0.0 (n/a) for R866, R895 (no step 13 fire), 0.0 (n/a) for R908 (no step 13 fire); per_anchor_attack_rebuttal_diversity = 7. mean_local_exploration_yield_rate_E38 = 0.20 (7 of 10 anchors with 1 yield each / per-anchor 1/3 of selected_25 from that anchor). learned_verifier_pre_reject_count_E38 = 2; learned_verifier_agreement_rate_E38 = 1.0 (7/7 PASS-to-step-14.6 SURVIVES); learned_verifier_false_positive_rate_E38 = 0.125 (1/8); learned_verifier_true_positive_count_E38 = 1. AFL post-epoch: 0 new entries (R934 pre-rejected; KCD stays at 6). anchor_update post-epoch: 3 sub-anchors promoted (R930, R939, R944); active_anchor_count 10 -> 13. ANCHOR_R866 and ANCHOR_R895 incremented epochs_since_yield = 2 (stale-drop at end of E39 if zero yield continues). ANCHOR_R908 (sub-anchor of R863) first-epoch yield test: 0 yield; epochs_since_yield = 1. refit_learned_verifier post-epoch: weights shifted slightly (w1, w2 increased; |w3|, |w4| increased; w5 decreased due to R940 FP); training labels 19 -> 26. Score_v19 = 108.91 (+8.51 vs v18's 100.40). p(no PASS|1%) at N=1046 = 0.0000274 (user target matched).
